"'''Mini-Mimban'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Tim Bresnan]] in [[2004]]. It adapts the exciting [[Duel on Mimban|climax]] of [[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]] for the miniature format.
